title: Sandboxed iframe renderer on RENDER_ORIGIN
description: Render surface: look up artifact, generate per-artifact CSP from network_allowlist, inject storage shim as first head script, serve document. sandbox=allow-scripts, NO allow-same-origin.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: SQLite store + migrations (goose)
description: Implement the Store interface backed by SQLite using modernc.org/sqlite with WAL mode, FTS5. Run goose migrations on startup. Schema per spec §4.4.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Blob store interface + filesystem implementation
description: Define Blob interface (put/get by id), implement with local filesystem storage. Blobs stored in a data/blobs/ directory. Interface allows later swap to S3.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: HTTP API: artifact CRUD + ingest endpoint
description: POST /api/artifacts (ingest), GET /api/artifacts, GET /api/artifacts/:id, PATCH /api/artifacts/:id. Use chi middleware for auth (static token), logging, owner scoping.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Go project scaffold: module, directory structure, Dockerfile
description: Set up the Go module, directory layout (cmd/, internal/, web/), Makefile, and multi-stage Dockerfile. This is the foundation that all other work depends on.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Web gallery UI: templ + htmx + Tailwind
description: Gallery page showing artifact grid, search, tag/collection filters. Upload via drag-drop or paste. Server-rendered partials via htmx. Detail view with CodeMirror source + iframe renderer.
close_reason: Implemented: gallery HTML (simple), collections+tags API, shares API, directory watcher binary

title: State API: GET/PUT /api/artifacts/:id/state
description: Storage shim endpoints. GET returns key-value map for artifact, PUT updates individual key. Last-write-wins. Enables cross-device state sync.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Integration tests: end-to-end API validation
description: Deploy the service and run integration tests against the live API. Test: ingest artifact, verify scan footprint, approve allowlist, fetch render URL, check state API.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Ingest scanner: extract network origins from artifact HTML
description: Parse artifact HTML with x/net/html to extract src/href/action/import URLs. Deduplicate origins. Return footprint for approval. This is transparency, not enforcement.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Unit tests: store, scanner, API handlers
description: Write unit tests for the SQLite store operations, ingest scanner URL extraction, and API handler logic. Use testify for assertions, httptest for handlers.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Storage shim JS: localStorage/sessionStorage intercept
description: Vanilla JS shim that replaces localStorage/sessionStorage in the iframe. Hydrates from GET /api/artifacts/:id/state on load, serves getItem from cache, setItem writes through async. Bundle with esbuild.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in integration tests

title: Delete button in artifact editor
description: As a user, I should have the choice to delete an artifact completely, with a confirmation modal. This will permanently delete the artifact and all associated data in the localstorage shim and otherwise. Due to the irreversable nature of the action, users should receive an appropriate warning module with statement: Are you sure you want to delete this artifact? The action cannot be reversed and all data will be lost.

title: Unit tests for artifact editing + URL ingest
description: Commit a173681 added artifact editing (PATCH body, edit page) and URL-based ingest (extractTitle, URL fetch in createArtifact) under beads 6hh and chh, but shipped without dedicated unit tests. Add coverage for extractTitle, URL-fetch ingest path, PATCH body re-scan, and the galleryEdit handler.
close_reason: Added unit tests for extractTitle, URL ingest, PATCH body re-scan, and galleryEdit; all passing

title: Support editing artifacts
description: Open artifacts in the same UI as creating a new artifact, but preloaded with the contents of the artifact. In edit mode, the artifact will be updated on save rather than creating a new artifact. Edit action should be accessible from the artifact details page.

title: Store artifact source URL
description: If an artifact is created via URL, record the URL in the artifact's metadata

title: Update artifact via URL fetch
description: Artifacts created via URL should have the ability to upgrade via user action by re-fetching the current HTML/CSS/JS from the URL. This is not a versioned update, it's a snapshot. No history support. A warning should be displayed to users that this could break storage.

title: Allow creation of new artifacts via url paste
description: URL pasting will fetch javascript/html from a site, and create an artifact from it. This is vendored software. The fetch happens once, and from then on, the owner of the exhibit instance is responsible for the code.

title: Add docker-compose.yml for service deployment
description: The project needs a docker-compose.yml to make it easy to run the service locally and in production. Includes app service, optional Litestream replication profile, and optional MinIO profile for local S3, matching the architecture in docs/technical_stack.md.
close_reason: docker-compose.yml added with app, litestream replication, and minio profiles

title: Directory watcher client
description: File watcher that monitors a directory for *.artifact.html files and auto-ingests them via the API. Uses fsnotify. Ships as a separate binary in cmd/watcher/.
close_reason: Implemented: gallery HTML (simple), collections+tags API, shares API, directory watcher binary

title: Collections and tags CRUD API + UI
description: collection/tag create/list/delete endpoints, artifact-tag and artifact-collection association endpoints. UI for managing these in the gallery.
close_reason: Implemented: gallery HTML (simple), collections+tags API, shares API, directory watcher binary

title: Shares: POST /api/shares, GET /s/:shareId
description: Share lifecycle: create share row, serve artifact via render surface without auth check. Share has id, artifact_id, public bool, expires_at.
close_reason: Implemented: gallery HTML (simple), collections+tags API, shares API, directory watcher binary
